name: Enjoei.com.br Atividades de Internet S.A.
summary: Enjoei.com.br Atividades de Internet S.A. operates a marketplace platform for the purchase and sale of products. It offers products for girls, boys, and kids, including accessories, clothes, beauty products, footwear, handbags, and toys; and furniture, antiques, decoration products, home appliances, lighting and kitchen products, computers, tablets, music products, telephones, photography products, video games, TVs and displays, and other products. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in S√É¬£o Paulo, Brazil.
